source.definition: Someone who has an excessively high opinion of themselves and believes they are better or more important than others.

explanation.sourceText: The adjective "conceited" comes from the verb "conceit," which originally meant 'to form an idea or concept.' Over time, it developed the meaning of having an overly favorable opinion of oneself, often without justification.
explanation.targetText: Cuvântul englezesc „conceited” provine de la verbul „conceit”, care inițial însemna „a forma o idee sau un concept”. În timp, a căpătat sensul de a avea o părere exagerat de bună despre sine, adesea fără o justificare reală.

target.definition: Persoană care are o părere exagerat de bună despre sine, adesea considerându-se superioară altora.

explanation.sourceText: The Romanian adjective „îngâmfat” is an internal derivation from the verb „a (se) îngâmfa”, probably related to „gâfâi” (to pant or breathe heavily). Its meaning developed to signify someone arrogant or conceited.
explanation.targetText: Adjectivul românesc „îngâmfat” este format intern din verbul „a (se) îngâmfa”, probabil înrudit cu „gâfâi” (a respira greu). Sensul s-a dezvoltat spre „arogant” sau „îngâmfat”.

examples.sourceText: He is so conceited that he never listens to others' opinions.
examples.targetText: Este atât de îngâmfat încât nu ascultă niciodată părerile altora.

examples.sourceText: A conceited person thinks they are better than everyone else.
examples.targetText: O persoană îngâmfată se consideră mai bună decât toți ceilalți.

examples.sourceText: She seems conceited, but actually she is just shy.
examples.targetText: Ea pare îngâmfată, dar de fapt este doar timidă.
Nu fi îngâmfat, ci rămâi modest.

learningTips.text: Think of 'conceited' as someone who 'conceives' themselves as better than others—like they have an inflated self-image.
The Romanian word 'îngâmfat' sounds like 'in-guff'—imagine someone puffed up with pride, almost out of breath from their arrogance.
Remember both 'conceited' and 'îngâmfat' describe a person who is 'full of themselves'—an easy way to link the two words.
Picture a conceited person as someone who can't stop 'gasping' for attention, just like the Romanian root related to heavy breathing.
